allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Raúl\\Desktop\\Rincon\\TROT\\Web"; npm audit --json 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty vulnerabilities | ForEach-Object { $_.PSObject.Properties } | Select-Object Name, @{N='severity';E={$_.Value.severity}}, @{N='via';E={\($_.Value.via | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -is [string]\) { $_ } else { $_.name } }\) -join ', '}} | Where-Object { $_.severity -in 'critical','high' } | Format-Table -AutoSize)
